notes:
- Real reading progress everywhere — the water fill and % now track your actual chapter
- Redesigned floating dock: frosted-glass pill with an animated active tab
- Home-screen widget now shows Continue Reading (title, cover, real %), not just narration
- Ambient home: time-of-day greeting + audiobook-first hero
- Jump-to-chapter search on long chapter lists
- Resume keeps your page when you reopen the same chapter
